findings.summary: 6 surgical fixes for MCP management hardening: validation guards, mutation error handling, async handleSave, IPC error wrapping, per-server Semaphore for race guards, ErrorBoundary around MCP dialog
Codebase uses Semaphore.makeUnsafe(1) + sem.withPermits(1)(effect) pattern for per-key mutual exclusion — follow this for mcp/index.ts
ErrorBoundary from solid-js wraps entire app — same API available for MCP dialog injection point in use-session-commands.tsx
